ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the participant (1 for male, 2 for female) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the participant record was last updated */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest education level of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "native_language" TEXT /* Native language of the participant */,
  "additional_languages" TEXT /* Additional languages spoken by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test (e.g., Big Five Personality Traits) */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the test (e.g., Big Five, Myers-Briggs) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test was last updated */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of the test in minutes */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for taking the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the trait */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trait */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Participant who took the test */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Test that was taken */,
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Trait being measured */,
  "score" REAL /* Score obtained in the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was taken */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was taken */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Actual duration of the test in minutes */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_trait_id FOREIGN KEY ("trait_id") REFERENCES traits ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trait_scores" (
  "trait_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait score */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Participant who obtained the score */,
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Trait being measured */,
  "score" REAL /* Score obtained for the trait */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the trait score was obtained */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the trait score was obtained */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Actual duration of the test in minutes */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the trait score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trait_scores_trait_id FOREIGN KEY ("trait_id") REFERENCES traits ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trait_scores_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., admin, data analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the researcher account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the researcher account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the researcher account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Researcher who accessed the data */,
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Test result being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_test_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("test_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
